MeasurementToolMetadata.LongName: 12-item grit scale (items 1-12) rated 1 (Not much like me at all) to 5 (Very much like me). Items 13-14 capture daily time use (free text) and item 15 is a checkbox of relaxation activities; these are not part of the grit score.

grit_1.Description: I am curious about many different things.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all
Not much like me at all

grit_3.Description: I have very few artistic interests.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_4.Description: I have been obsessed with a certain idea for a short time but later lost interest.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_5.Description: I am dilligent. People say I am an extremely hard worker.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_6.Description: I am ingenious. I like to think deeply about ideas.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_7.Description: I often set a goal but later choose to pursue a different one.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_8.Description: I have difficulty maintaining focus on projects that take more than a few months to complete.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_9.Description: I am creative. I enjoy inventing things and have an active imagination.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all
Not much like me at all

grit_11.Description: I am original. I very often come up with new ideas.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_12.Description: I value beauty, whether in music, literature, art, or nature.

Levels.1: Not much like me at all

grit_13.Description: Over the last year, about how many hours per day, during a typical day, did you spend relaxing?

grit_14.Description: Over the last year, about how many hours per day, during a typical day, did you spend working/studying/doing chores?

grit_15___0.Description: Watch TV, use Facebook, surf the internet, play video games (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

grit_15___1.Description: Text or talk to friends, socialize (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

grit_15___2.Description: Watch or play sports, exercise (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

grit_15___3.Description: Read for pleasure, listen to music (checkbox option; 1 = selected, 0 = not selected)

grit_score_grittiness.Description: Perseverance ('grit') subscale: mean of items grit_2,4,5,7,8,10. n/a if any item missing.

grit_score_openness.Description: Consistency of interest / openness subscale: mean of items grit_1,3,6,9,11,12. n/a if any item missing.
